conflicts.description: The prior sheet treated the detailed route-log confession as no longer hidden from Bea by chapter 17, but the manuscript stages the confession privately with Oscar first and Nina joining mid-scene; Bea only relays that Beni gave Oscar the book and cash in chapter 18.
conflicts.canonical_value: The falsified logbook stays hidden from Oscar until chapter_17 and from Eszter and Bea until chapter_18.
conflicts.resolution_note: Chapter 17 limits firsthand knowledge to Oscar and Nina; chapter 18 explicitly shows Bea and then Eszter knowing about the book and cash after the gala.
